nodes.label: Python Package Domain Restructure Design
nodes.summary: Breaking public API migration from flat modules to domain-oriented packages with score-oriented vocabulary and focused implementation modules.

nodes.label: Domain-oriented package architecture
nodes.summary: Target layout organizes EvoCore into core, search_space, lifecycle, results, optimizers, callbacks, and surrogates packages.

edges.rationale: The restructure design defines the target domain package tree.
The target layout places shared ask/tell contracts under evocore.lifecycle.
